rawIntent: Add an isNonEmpty utility under src/shared/utils/is-non-empty with isNonEmpty(s: string): boolean returning true when s.length > 0.

successCriteria.description: The isNonEmpty utility function is implemented and returns true when the input string length is greater than 0.

constraints: Input validated at the API boundary: All request bodies validated with Zod (or equivalent) before reaching.
No sensitive data in logs: PII, tokens, passwords, and PCI/PHI data must never appear in log lines.
outOfScope: Any other utilities or functions outside of src/shared/utils/is-non-empty
